introSection: Dinoconda is an S&S – Sansei Technologies 4th Dimension roller coaster located at China Dinosaurs Park in Jiangsu, China. It is one of only three 4D hypercoasters in the world. It has a capacity of 24 riders per train.
fullText: Dinoconda is an S&S – Sansei Technologies 4th Dimension roller coaster located at China Dinosaurs Park in Jiangsu, China. It is one of only three 4D hypercoasters in the world. It has a capacity of 24 riders per train.
